# Shyftd Ink

> Neon color realism and pop culture graffiti surrealism tattoo studio. Custom commissions, available flash designs, prints, and stickers — booked from shyftdink.com.

Shyftd Ink is a custom tattoo studio specializing in bold, bright, color-realism work with pop culture and graffiti-surrealism influences. Booking is by appointment only.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview, featured portfolio, and available flash highlights.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Full archive of completed tattoo work.
- [Flash](/flash): Available, one-of-a-kind flash designs ready to be tattooed.
- [Shop](/merch): Limited prints, holographic stickers, and original artwork.
- [Book](/book): Booking request form for custom tattoos and flash claims.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, social links, studio hours, and response time.
